title: Cubic Sun and Moon
description: 🌟 Cubic Stars is a Minecraft texture pack that upgrades the sun ☀️ and moon 🌙 with stunning 3D models
body:
🌟 Cubic Stars is a Minecraft texture pack that upgrades the sun ☀️ and moon 🌙 with stunning 3D models, giving your skies more depth and realism than ever before.

✨ Say goodbye to the flat, traditional look and welcome a more immersive sky! Every sunrise 🌅 and moonlit night 🌌 becomes breathtaking, making your adventures feel truly magical.

🌞 Whether you're building under the warm glow of the sun or exploring by moonlight, Cubic Stars transforms the atmosphere of your world with beauty and style. Perfect for players who love aesthetic upgrades 🎨 and want their sky to feel alive.

🔹 Features:

🌞 Enhanced Visuals: Sun and moon in detailed 3D.
🌌 Immersive Sky: A captivating atmosphere both day and night.
⚡ Easy Installation: Works with all versions that support custom texture packs.
⬆️ Upgrade your Minecraft skies with Cubic Stars and enjoy a breathtaking view every time you look up! 🌟

![Cubic SaM](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e81665ae0046fb5c3fc8a10ba5a5b26c2d2130ed_0.webp)
